Name: Madam Cook
About: Our mission at MadamCook is to celebrate and elevate the rich flavors of Nigerian cuisine by offering premium, easy-to-use culinary products and services. With a focus on tradition, innovation, and authenticity, we aim to make Nigerian dishes accessible to every home, inspire creativity in cooking, and foster a deeper appreciation for our vibrant culinary heritage.

People Like ME
About: A bold and expressive visual identity crafted for People Like ME—a one-day gathering of Christian creatives, filmmakers, and drama ministers. The branding reflects unity, purpose, and divine creativity, bringing faith and storytelling together in a vibrant, memorable experience.

Name: BiStantly
About:
BiStantly is an on-demand logistics and delivery brand built for speed, urgency, and instant movement. Focused on serving small- to medium-scale businesses, it delivers fast and reliable solutions that keep goods moving without delay.
The project encompassed BiStantly's core brand identity, logo, visual system, and brand guidelines, all designed to work seamlessly across digital and physical platforms. Guided by motion and acceleration, the identity uses a bold icon, custom block typography, and a focused two-colour palette led by orange, positioning BiStantly as a dependable, fast-moving delivery brand ready for scale.
Tags: Brand Identity Design, Branding, Food, Logo design
